name: standards closed-loop validation cleans up the synthetic test artifacts after a successful run
command: mkdir -p active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-source test-std --rules-out active-rules --cleanup 2>out.txt && [ ! -f active-rules/test-std-1-1.yaml ] && grep -q 'cleanup=done' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
